item.title: Simply Susan’s Red Dot Sale - 05/16/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/29/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is the BIGGEST sale we have ever had! It’s been almost 11 years in business & we need a fresh start! So we need to clean out space to clean, paint & refresh our space for the holiday season! PLUS! We have some new things in the works Some perfect additions for the fall & holiday season! We are adding items DAILY!
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Simply Susan’s Red Dot Sale on May 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include cleaning and fall.

item.title: MST Food Truck - 05/21/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/21/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 182 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA MST Food Truck will be in the front parking lot of St. Francis Home on Thursday, May 21st from 10am-2pm. Come out and get some good eats!
item.dc:creator: St. Francis Senior Ministries
item.yodel:media_alt_text: MST Food Truck on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include good eats and senior ministries.

item.title: MST Food Truck - 05/21/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/21/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 182 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA MST Food Truck will be in the front parking lot of St. Francis Home on Thursday, May 21st from 10am-2pm. Come out and get some good eats!
item.dc:creator: St. Francis Senior Ministries
item.yodel:media_alt_text: MST Food Truck on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include good eats and senior ministries.

item.title: Barking Lot Party - Third Thursday in Downtown Tiffin - 05/21/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for a paw-some evening in Downtown Tiffin on Thursday, May 21, 2026, from 5 to 8 PM! Enjoy a pet-friendly night out with your furry friends as you stroll through downtown and discover a pet-friendly experience throughout the downtown district. Stay tuned for more details and a list of participating businesses! If your dog is aggressive toward other dogs, children, or strangers, we kindly ask that you leave them at home. All dogs must be leashed, and owners are responsible for bringing doggie bags and cleaning up after their pets. Mark your calendars and plan to join us for a fun and pet-friendly evening in Downtown Tiffin!
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Barking Lot Party - Third Thursday in Downtown Tiffin on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and aggressive dogs.

item.title: TU Comes to You: Cincinnati - 05/21/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come reconnect with fellow alumni and friends for a fun and relaxed evening at one of Cincinnati’s most iconic breweries. For $35 per person, your registration includes a guided brewery tour, delicious food, and a pint while you catch up with the TU community and hear the latest updates from campus. Whether you’re looking to reconnect with old friends, meet fellow Dragons in the area, or simply enjoy a great night out, this is an event you won’t want to miss. Space is limited, so be sure to reserve your spot today! Date: May 21, 2026 Time: 6:00 – 8:00 p.m. Location: Rhinegeist Brewery 1910 Elm St. Cincinnati, OH 45202 Register at http://tiffin.edu/.../events/tu-comes-to-you-cincinnati/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University Alumni & Friends
item.yodel:media_alt_text: TU Comes to You: Cincinnati on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Lifestyle and alumni.

item.title: Breakfast at JAM’s Markets SATURDAYS 9-2pm - 05/23/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/23/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy from scratch made breakfast and lunch items featuring buzzworthy sourdough artisan breads
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Breakfast at JAM’s Markets SATURDAYS 9-2pm on May 23, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Markets.

item.title: YLFCU Memorial Day Parade 2026 - 05/25/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/25/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 05/26/2026 12:00am EDT to 05/26/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health - Springfield
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include 3d technology and comfortable experience.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 05/26/2026 12:00am EDT to 05/26/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Science & Tech and 3d technology.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 05/26/2026 12:00am EDT to 05/26/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.

item.title: The Tragic End - presented by Mike Gilbert - 05/26/2026 10:30am EDT to 05/26/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tragic End: The Assassination of Robert F Kennedy - Mike Gilbert is a very interesting speaker. Please call Allen Eiry Center at (419) 448-9774 to save a seat.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The Tragic End - presented by Mike Gilbert on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include assassination of robert f kennedy and mike gilbert.

item.title: Trivia Tuesday: Music - 05/26/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/26/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Trivia Tuesday,” an adult trivia night on Tuesday, May 26 from 6:00 to 8:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Join us for an evening of fun, facts, and friendly competition. Teams will battle it out over six exciting rounds designed to test your knowledge about music. Prizes for the winning team include a custom 3D-printed trophy made right here at the Library. This free program is open to both adults and teens. Space is limited so registration is required by visiting the online calendar at www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org. For more information, please call (419) 447-3751 or log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Trivia Tuesday: Music on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Music & Entertainment and adult trivia night.

item.title: Collaborative Luncheon | May - 05/27/2026 11:30am EDT to 05/27/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 248 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Welcome to the Seneca County Collaborative Luncheon series, where you have a seat at the table for a gathering filled with networking, education, promotion, and impact. On the menu… Date & Time: Wednesday, May 27, 2026 11:30 AM: Doors Open 11:30 AM - 12 PM: Networking 12 PM - 1 PM: Program Location: Tiffin University’s Marion Center Featured Speaker: Elected Officials Topic: Legislative Lunch Registration: $25 for members and non-members Our luncheon series is designed to provide a comprehensive experience that embodies the mission of the Collaborative and allows our organization to best serve you. Reserve your seat today at: https://senecaregionalchamberofcommerceoh.growthzoneapp.c... Experience the Collaborative one bite at a time. See you at the luncheon!
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Collaborative Luncheon | May on May 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Business and Government.

item.title: Permanent Jewelry Pop Up - 05/27/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/27/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 138 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at Empire for a special Permanent Jewelry Pop-Up with Linked by Savannah. Stop in anytime from 5–8 PM to get linked with a custom-fit piece you can wear every day. Choose your chain, get sized, and have it welded on for a seamless, clasp-free finish. We’re pairing the experience with our regular Wine Wednesday, featuring $5 house pours all evening, making it the perfect midweek outing. No appointments needed—this is a first come, first served pop-up. We recommend arriving early to ensure availability. Grab your friends, sip some wine, and treat yourself to something permanent.
item.dc:creator: The Empire Bistro
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Permanent Jewelry Pop Up on May 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include custom-fit and midweek outing.

item.title: How to Read a Book Like a Professor: Follow-Up Discussion - 05/28/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/28/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA **PLEASE NOTE THE DATE AND LOCATION CHANGE As part of the 2026 Christopher D. English Community Read, Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “How to Read a Book Like a Professor: Follow-Up Discussion” on Thursday, May 28 at 6:00 p.m. in the Junior Home Room. Heidelberg Professor Dr. Barry Devine will return to the Library to lead a discussion on The Astral Library. This program explores the novel and reflect on Dr. Devine’s earlier session, discussing how his tips and techniques influenced the reading experience. The Community Read features a series of special programs to honor the book The Astral Library by Kate Quinn. Each year the Community Read encourages people in Seneca County to read the selected title and come together for special events and discussions. As the featured event in the Community Read, Kate Quinn, a New York Times best-selling author, will speak to the community on Tuesday, April 28 at 6:30 p.m. at the Chandelier Community Event Center. The author event is completely free and open to the community and will be followed by a book signing. Copies of The Astral Library will be available for purchase thanks to the Pan Yan Bookstore. Information about additional programs and the 2026 Community Read can be found at www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/community-read.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: How to Read a Book Like a Professor: Follow-Up Discussion on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include best-selling author and book signing.

item.title: Seneca Proud Book Club - 05/28/2026 6:30pm EDT to 05/28/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 137 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Book club is open to everyone, even if you haven't finished reading the book yet. Books are available at Pan Yan Bookstore in downtown Tiffin and also through the public library.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca Proud Book Club on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include reading and seneca proud.

item.title: "Birch Trees and Path" Thursday, May 28, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #05282601 or #05282602 - 05/28/2026 9:00pm EDT to 05/29/2026 12:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Friday, May 22. Paint "Birch Trees and Path" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Thursday, May 28 from 9am until 12 pm or from 6pm-9pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 11"x14" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Birch Trees and Path" Thursday, May 28, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #05282601 or #05282602 on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include birch trees and path and Arts.

item.title: Summer Reading Kick-Off with Whiz Bang Science - 05/29/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/29/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will kick off the 2026 Summer Reading Program with a kickoff party on Friday, May 29 from 5:00 to 7:00 p.m. at the East Green Amphitheater Celebrate the official start of summer at the Library. Beginning at 5:00, sign up for summer reading, use chalk to decorate the sidewalks, enjoy free refreshments, and watch an interactive science show with Dr. Dave at 6:00 p.m. Dr. Dave has the unique ability to take complex scientific concepts and explain them in a simple and fun manner. He brings his blend of fun and educational science experiments to the library in a show you will never forget. For all ages; registration is not required. The 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story,” runs from June 1 through July 31. For more information, call 419-447-3751 or log on to www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Reading Kick-Off with Whiz Bang Science on May 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and all ages.

item.title: "Quiet Pond" Saturday, May 30, 2026 9am-12pm #05302601 - 05/30/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/30/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Saturday, May 23. Paint "Quiet Pond" in acrylics with Carol Hoffman on Saturday, May 30 from 9am until 12 pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 12"x16" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Quiet Pond" Saturday, May 30, 2026 9am-12pm #05302601 on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include quiet pond and Arts.

item.title: Farmers Market - 05/30/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/30/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Discover the joy of fresh produce, delightful baked goods, and stunning flowers, all waiting for you every Saturday morning!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmers Market on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community and flowers.

item.title: Breakfast at JAM’s Markets SATURDAYS 9-2pm - 05/30/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/30/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy from scratch made breakfast and lunch items featuring buzzworthy sourdough artisan breads
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Breakfast at JAM’s Markets SATURDAYS 9-2pm on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Food & Drink and artisan breads.

item.title: Celebrate 30 Years—Park Scrabble - 05/30/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/30/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA To help celebrate 30 years, the Seneca County Park District will host a “park scrabble” game  Hike the trail looking for letters to then place on the giant scrabble board.  How many “park” words can you create? Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate 30 Years—Park Scrabble on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include park scrabble and Parks & Rec.

item.title: Autumnwood Care Center 2nd Annual Motorcycle and Car show - 05/30/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/30/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 670 OH-18, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Autumnwood Care Center’s 2nd Annual Motorcycle & Car Show Join us for a great afternoon of vehicles, food, and community while supporting a meaningful cause! Saturday, May 30 11:00 AM – 1:00 PM Autumnwood Care Center 607 E State Route 18 Tiffin, Ohio 44883 This event will benefit the Seneca County Honor Bus, helping local veterans travel to Washington, D.C. to visit the memorials built in their honor. Event Highlights: • Motorcycle & Car Show • Cookout • 50/50 Raffle • Gift Basket Raffle All activities are by donation and the event is open to the public. Bring your friends, family, and your favorite ride and help us support our veterans! Questions? Call 419-447-7151
item.dc:creator: Autumnwood Care Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Autumnwood Care Center 2nd Annual Motorcycle and Car show on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and veterans.

item.title: Tiffin Butterflies - 05/30/2026 1:30pm EDT to 05/30/2026 2:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 194 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for an introduction to 12-15 colorful butterfly species that are common locally during the summer, followed by a short walk looking for a few of them. Program led by Leonard Weber.
item.dc:creator: Franciscan Earth Literacy Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin Butterflies on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include short walk and tiffin butterflies.

item.title: Pride-Month Kickoff Picnic - 05/31/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/31/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 491 Coe St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA We've reserved the AMVETS Shelter in Hedges-Boyer Park, across from the YMCA for a Big Gay family-reunion-style picnic We're grilling up burgers, hotdogs, NotDogs, and veggie burgers. We'll bring the napkins, silverware, and plates. Bring a side or dessert to share if you're able. We'll have games and activities for all ages, including a community art project and the opportunity to PIE A BOARD MEMBER... stay tuned for more details.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Pride-Month Kickoff Picnic on May 31, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include games and activities and pride month.

item.title: 12a | Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase - 06/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/01/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 12a | Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin-seneca public library and Kids & Family.

item.title: Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase - 06/01/2026 9:30am EDT to 06/01/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library’s virtual craft series for adults, “Make It At Home,” will offer free supply kits and an instructional video on how to make a folded book vase beginning Monday, June 1. Patrons can pick up a supply kit at the Information Desk full of almost everything needed to make a craft each month, and will only need to use a few basic supplies from home. An instructional video on how to make the vase will be posted on the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library YouTube channel and Facebook page. Please note that kits will be available on a first-come, first-served basis, and registration is not required. One kit per adult. Must be present to receive your kit. This program is free for adults. If all kits are gone, the instruction video and information sheet can still be found at www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/junemakeitathome.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include free supply kits and instructional video.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/01/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/01/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Track your progress along the way (details coming soon!) • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657 Stay Tuned: More details—including how to play, prizes, and participating locations—will be announced soon!
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include local businesses and seasonal.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and tiffin's wild goose chase.

item.title: Class I: Growing Basil - 06/01/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/01/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Learn how to successfully grow basil from plant to thriving herb garden. Tips for site selection (indoors & outdoors) Soil basics & watering needs Ongoing basil plant maintenance How to keep basil full, healthy & productive
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Class I: Growing Basil on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include plant maintenance and site selection.

item.title: 2p | Teen Tuesday - 06/02/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/02/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2p | Teen Tuesday on Jun 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include teen tuesday and tiffin-seneca public library.

item.title: Coffee Connect - 06/03/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/03/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come meet with the management of Your Legacy Federal Credit Union every first Wednesday of the month at 11AM. This is a chance for members to have a cup of coffee and come voice their concerns, praises, or just ask questions. Eligible Members of the community are welcome to learn more about the "Credit Union Difference" and find out how our 70+ year Seneca County institution can help you with your current finances and future plans!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Coffee Connect on Jun 3, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Business and community.

item.title: Farm to Table Baking - 06/03/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/03/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us on June 3rd for the Farm to Table Baking class, where you'll craft artisan herb rolls and a delightful stonefruit galette using fresh, seasonal ingredients. Perfect for bakers of all levels, this hands-on experience brings flavor and creativity to your kitchen!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farm to Table Baking on Jun 3, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include farm to table baking and hands-on experience.

item.title: Open Houses for Affordable Homes in Tiffin - 06/04/2026 5:00pm EDT to 06/04/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 459 S Sandusky St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for our open houses at the newly constructed affordable homes on South Sandusky Street in Tiffin. All four homes will be open for browsing, giving attendees the opportunity to tour the homes and view the layouts, finishes, and features in person. Applications for the homes are closed, but all are welcome to attend and see the results of this project and the new homeownership opportunities it has created in our community. Open House Dates: Thursday, June 4 | 5:00–8:00 p.m. Friday, June 5 | 11:00 a.m.–2:00 p.m. Location: 459 S. Sandusky Street Tiffin, OH 44883 More information about the project is available at TiffinHomes.org.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Open Houses for Affordable Homes in Tiffin on Jun 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include newly constructed homes and open houses.

item.title: “Junk Journal” Repurposed Book Class - 06/04/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/04/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Turn a worn book into a one‑of‑a‑kind “junk journal” Join us at JAM’s Markets for a hands-on class where you’ll repurpose an old book using rescued papers, envelopes, and found materials. Learn simple techniques to cut, fold, and bind pages into a journal you’ll actually use. All materials are provided—feel free to bring scraps, tickets, or photos to personalize your journal. By upcycling together, we reduce waste and support JAM’s mission of creative, sustainable community spaces. Baked Potato bar will also be provided! (Price included in the $65 ticket price) Follow this link to reserve your space! https://www.zeffy.com/.../junk-journal-repurposed-book-class BYOB Thursday June 4th 6pm @ JAM’s Markets 145 Madison St Tiffin, Ohio 44883
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: “Junk Journal” Repurposed Book Class on Jun 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include creative community and hands-on class.

item.title: Taste of China - 06/04/2026 6:30pm EDT to 06/04/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy the flavors of China
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of China on Jun 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Food & Drink and Causes.

item.title: Financial Fitness Friday - 06/05/2026 8:30am EDT to 06/05/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join our Financial Counselor Rusti Claydon for Financial Fitness Friday, a new monthly event for our membership for FREE walk-in assistance and education surrounding your financial concerns! The first Friday of each month, Rusti has cleared her schedule to allow for members of the credit union to stop in and ask questions about their situation, ask for insights into how we can assist and how to better utilize Your Legacy Federal Credit Union offerings to their benefit! Not a member? Rusti can get you started with just a $5 minimum initial share. See you there!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Financial Fitness Friday on Jun 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include rusti claydon and tiffin, ohio.

item.description: Location : 459 S Sandusky St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for our open houses at the newly constructed affordable homes on South Sandusky Street in Tiffin. All four homes will be open for browsing, giving attendees the opportunity to tour the homes and view the layouts, finishes, and features in person. Applications for the homes are closed, but all are welcome to attend and see the results of this project and the new homeownership opportunities it has created in our community. Open House Dates: Thursday, June 4 | 5:00–8:00 p.m. Friday, June 5 | 11:00 a.m.–2:00 p.m. Location: 459 S. Sandusky Street Tiffin, OH 44883 More information about the project is available at TiffinHomes.org.

item.title: "Colored Pencil Honey" Saturday, June 6, 2026 9am-12pm #06062601 - 06/06/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/06/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA In this class you will use colored pencils to create a 5"x7" drawing of honey, learning about strokes and blending techniques. All supplies are provided. Preregistration is required by Wednesday, June 3. Minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $45 for TAG members & $55 for non-members. Contact Mike Fink (813-695-0506), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Colored Pencil Honey" Saturday, June 6, 2026 9am-12pm #06062601 on Jun 6, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Arts.

item.title: Saturday Nights with Mimi - 06/06/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/06/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 138 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Saturday Nights with Mimi A New Monthly Piano Series at Empire Bistro Join us for the very first evening in our new live music series featuring the talented Mimi Lange Johnston on the piano! On Saturday, June 6th from 6–9 PM, settle in for an evening of live piano music, great food, cocktails, and a relaxed atmosphere in downtown Tiffin. Our kickoff event will feature beloved summer classics and timeless favorites — the perfect soundtrack to the unofficial start of the season following Memorial Day weekend. Whether you're joining us for dinner, drinks, or simply to enjoy the music, we invite you to make it a Saturday night tradition. Reservations are encouraged.
item.dc:creator: The Empire Bistro
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Saturday Nights with Mimi on Jun 6, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include piano and seasonal.
